response.justification: Bogdan has solid full-stack and distributed systems fundamentals with over 15 years of experience, but lacks the core competencies this role demands. There is no evidence of experimentation platform work, A/B testing infrastructure, feature flagging, telemetry pipelines, or statistical/experimental analysis — all of which are central to this Principal-level position. His most relevant work (high-throughput micro-services at Dunnhumby) demonstrates scale, but not the growth engineering discipline required. He also holds a Senior title, is currently in a career gap, and the resume shows no cross-team platform ownership at the scope expected for IC6.
strengths: Proven high-throughput distributed systems experience at Dunnhumby handling millions of HTTP requests per second
Broad language coverage including C, C++, Java, and JavaScript/TypeScript, matching several required languages
Staff-level technical roles with open-source platform ownership and community knowledge-sharing
concerns: Zero experimentation platform, A/B testing, feature flagging, or rollout-risk management experience anywhere in the resume
No telemetry infrastructure, metrics pipelines, or statistical/experimental analysis background
Below required seniority (Senior, not Principal/IC6) and currently in an active career gap since October 2025
